description: Clones have been selected for sequencing that align near the BX682532.4 - AL354712.18 region of Chr. 1. These may be used to improve the reference or to represent an alternate haplotype.
resolution: AC256219.1 has been sequenced and submitted, closing the gap between AC245034.2 and AC245056.3.
comment: This sequence will be incorporated into the reference assembly in the next major assembly release. At that time, the accession number for this patch will be made secondary to the reference chromosome accession. This scaffold closes the gap between GRCh38 Chromosome 1 components AC245034.2 and AC245056.3 with the addition of AC256219.1 (NC_000001.11:12,954,385-13,004,384).

summary: There is a gap in the Reference between components AC245034.2 and AC245056.3 in GRCh38.
description: There is a gap in the Reference between components AC245034.2 and AC245056.3 in GRCh38.  This gap ticket is a continuation of the same gap outlined in HG-457.

description: Clones from the CH17 library have been selected for sequencing that align near the AL358794.19 - BX284668.4 region of Chr. 1 (GRCh38 coordinates NC_000001.11:16,310,000-17,150,000). These will be used to close a sequence gap in the region and/or represent an alternate haplotype.
resolution: This CH17 pathway has been uploaded to the Chr. 1 Primary and PATCHES TPF's.
comment: This sequence will be incorporated into the reference assembly in the next major assembly release. At that time, the accession number for this patch will be made secondary to the reference chromosome accession. This scaffold uses a CHM1 single haplotype path to close an assembly gap between GRCh38 components AL021920.1 and BX284668.4.  It also adds 3 novel NBPF1-like genes and 3 novel MST1-like genes to the reference assembly.
